title: alnus orientalis
intro: Alnus orientalis, also known as the Oriental or Japanese alder, is a deciduous shrub or small tree native to Asia and parts of Europe. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties. The health benefits of Alnus orientalis include reducing inflammation, improving cardiovascular health, and supporting the immune system. Herbal preparations of Alnus orientalis can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat various health conditions, including respiratory issues, digestive problems, and skin irritations.
